notes_for_human_reviewer: FORMAT-PEDANT FAILURE MODE — the chapter's bureaucratic-afterthought concern in human form. The learner focuses entirely on visual structure (H2/H3, ISO dates, PDF vs Word, template library) and entirely misses the substantive issues (loose attribution, vague actions, TBDs, evaluative phrasing, 5-day delay, distribution gap). structural_correctness gets a 2 not a 1 because the learner does at least raise structural concerns, but they are the wrong structural concerns — section headings vs the chapter's Decisions/Actions/Notes discipline. correction_and_distribution_judgment also gets 2 because formatting the distribution list as a bulleted list counts as a passing mention. Everything else floors at 1. Tests whether the grader catches submissions that perform thoroughness through cosmetics while missing every substantive failure mode.
